columns.name: BESKRIVELSE
columns.description: Detailed description of the frakt code

columns.name: FRAKTTABNR_TILLAG
columns.description: Optional additional identifier for shipping rate table

columns.name: TIDSPUNKT
columns.description: Timestamp of when the record was created or modified

columns.name: STEDSFRAKT
columns.description: Indicates if place-specific shipping charges apply

columns.name: FKNR_LAGERTILLEGG
columns.description: Amount for storage related to the fracht code

columns.name: VISES_I_VAREAJOURHOLD
columns.description: Indicates if this frakt code is displayed in vareajourhold (inventory management system)

columns.name: FRAKTKODE_SAM_SUM
columns.description: Code indicating whether different frakt codes should be combined for the same order

columns.name: FKNR_STEDSFRAKT_TILSKUDD
columns.description: Additional amount for place-specific shipping charges

columns.name: FKNR_STEDSFRAKT_TILSK_UREF
columns.description: Unreferenced additional amount for place-specific shipping charges

columns.name: SESONG_RABNR
columns.description: Number identifying the season discount applicable to this frakt code
